headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Is Up 22.3% After Raising 2026 Outlook On Record Infrastructure Backlog - What's Changed
summary: In late April 2026, Quanta Services reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$7,874.79 million and net income of US$220.63 million, with both basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations rising compared with a year earlier. The company also raised its full-year 2026 outlook, now guiding to revenues of about US$34.70–US$35.20 billion and diluted EPS of US$9.17–US$9.87, underpinned by a record backlog and strong demand for grid and data center-related...

headline: The Market Is Discovering The Industrial Supply Chain Of AI
summary: This is not just a speculative AI rally. The pattern running through the strongest performers is more specific: the market is beginning to reward the physical stack behind AI. Read more here

headline: Morning Call Sheet: AI boom and easing oil fears lift markets
summary: Jeff Kilburg, Founder and CEO of KKM Financial, Stephanie Link, Chief Investment Strategist at Hightower, and Matt Powers, Managing Partner at Powers Advisory Group, say AI driven earnings strength and easing oil fears are supporting stocks despite geopolitical risks.
